landingpage.undertitel: Kammerslusen Ribe is a payment system for the ships in Ribe. It is a system that makes it easy for the ships to pay to pass through the lock, and it also makes it easy for the lock to keep track of which ships have paid and which have not.
landingpage.section1Content: Kammerslusen Ribe is a payment system for the ships in Ribe. It is a system that makes it easy for the ships to pay to pass through the lock, and it also makes it easy for the lock to keep track of which ships have paid and which have not.

settings.fullnameDescription: Update your full name, which is displayed on your profile and in your transactions.

settings.registerBoatDescription: Register a new boat so we can keep track of it in our system, and to ensure that you are the right person using the lock.

termsofservice.title: Terms of service
termsofservice.introduction: Welcome to Ribe Sejlklub's payment system. By using our services, you agree to comply with these terms of service. Please read these terms carefully, as they contain important information about your rights and obligations.

section1.title: §1 Delivery
section1.content: When you make a purchase through our payment system, we will endeavor to deliver the purchased service as quickly as possible. In most cases, delivery will occur within a few minutes after the purchase.

section2.title: §2 Right of withdrawal and refunds
section2.content: Since this involves the delivery of digital content that is not provided on a physical medium, you accept by completing the purchase that the right of withdrawal expires as soon as the service begins. All sales are final as a general rule, but contact support@pins.dk in case of technical errors.

section3.title: §3 Disclaimer
section3.content: Ribe Sejlklub and its payment system are provided 'as is' without any form of warranty. We disclaim any liability for any damages or losses that may arise from the use of our services.

section4.title: §4 School project disclaimer
section4.content: This is a school project and not an official product from Ribe Sejlklub. All information and features are fictional and for demonstration only. Use of the system is at your own risk.

section5.title: §5 Changes to the terms
section5.content: We reserve the right to change these terms. Any changes will be published on the website, and it is your responsibility to keep yourself updated.

section6.title: §6 Choice of law and jurisdiction
section6.content: These terms of service are governed by Danish law. Any dispute shall be brought before the Danish courts.

section7.title: §7 Contact information
section7.content: If you have questions about these terms, you can contact us at support@pins.dk.

privacypolicy.title: Privacy Policy
privacypolicy.introduction: This privacy policy describes how Ribe Sejlklub collects, uses and protects your personal data when you use our payment system. We take your data security seriously and comply with applicable legislation, including GDPR.

section1.title: §1 What data do we collect?
section1.content: When you create an account and make a purchase, we collect the necessary information to provide the service. This typically includes your name, email address, technical network data (such as IP address for security reasons) and your purchase history.

section2.title: §2 Third parties and data sharing
section2.content: We never sell your personal data. To operate the platform, we share necessary data with trusted subcontractors (data processors). Your payment information is handled exclusively by our payment gateway, Stripe, and we never have direct access to your full card details. Our infrastructure and security are provided by Cloudflare.

section3.title: §3 Cookies and tracking
section3.content: Our website uses only necessary cookies (technical cookies) to manage your login and ensure the payment system works correctly. We do not use marketing or tracking cookies from third parties.

section4.title: §4 Security measures
section4.content: To ensure the highest possible protection of your data and prevent unauthorized access, all data traffic is encrypted. In addition, it is an internal requirement that all our administrators and developers use two-factor authentication (2FA) for access to critical systems.

section5.title: §5 Storage of receipts (Bookkeeping Act)
section5.content: Even if you delete your account, we are required under the Danish Bookkeeping Act to retain receipts and associated transaction data (including your email address linked to the purchase) for 5 years from the end of the relevant financial year. These data are stored solely for accounting purposes.

section6.title: §6 Your rights and data deletion
section6.content: You have the right at any time to access the data we have registered about you. You can delete your account under 'Settings'. Upon deletion, your personal data is permanently removed from our active databases, with the exception of data covered by the Bookkeeping Act (see §5).

section7.title: §7 School project disclaimer
section7.content: This system and this privacy policy have been developed as a school project and do not constitute an official or legally binding document for Ribe Sejlklub. All information, data handling and features are fictional and solely for demonstration.

section8.title: §8 Contact information
section8.content: If you have questions about our processing of your data or wish to exercise your rights, you can contact us at support@pins.dk.

faq.title: Do you have questions?
faq.undertitle: Here are some of the most common questions we get from our users. If you do not find the answer to your question here, you are welcome to contact us directly.

questions.question: How do I create an account?
questions.answer: You can create an account by clicking the 'Sign up' button on the front page and filling out the registration form with your information.

questions.question: How do I pay to pass through the lock?
questions.answer: You can pay by logging into your account and following the instructions to complete the payment.

questions.question: What do I do if I have problems with the payment?
questions.answer: If you experience problems with the payment, please contact our support team at support@pins.dk.

questions.question: How can I see my payment history?
questions.answer: You can see your payment history by logging into your account and navigating to the 'History' section.

questions.question: How can I change my account information?
questions.answer: You can change your account information by logging into your account and going to the 'Settings' section, where you can update your information.

HowToPay.title: Payment process
HowToPay.subtitle: Easy and secure – E-payment made simple
HowToPay.description: We use Stripe to handle all transactions, so you can focus on sailing.

step1.title: Reserve amount
step1.description: When you reserve a lock passage, we reserve an amount on your card to ensure you have coverage for the sailing. This amount is automatically refunded after the sailing.

step2.title: Complete payment
step2.description: We use Stripe, one of the world's most reliable payment providers, to ensure your information is protected throughout the process.

step3.title: Enjoy the sailing
step3.description: After the sailing, we automatically settle your actual usage. If you reserved too much, we refund the excess amount immediately.
